settings.title: Settings
settings.discogs.title: Discogs
settings.discogs.importDesc: Import records from your Discogs collection that aren't in More'Wax yet.
settings.discogs.missingMeta: {count, plural, one {# record} other {# records}} missing release metadata — first sync will index them automatically.
settings.claude.title: Claude AI
settings.auth.title: Authentication
settings.auth.description: Optional. Enable Google Sign-In to protect your app when exposed to the internet.
settings.auth.allowedEmailsHint: Comma-separated. Leave blank for first-login-locks (first user to sign in becomes the owner).
settings.auth.enabled.title: Authentication enabled
settings.auth.enabled.description: Google Sign-In is now active. When accessed from the internet, users will need to sign in with an authorized Google account.
settings.auth.enabled.ownerNote: The first person to sign in will become the owner — no other account will be able to access the app unless you add them in settings.
settings.auth.enabled.lanNote: Local access (LAN) remains open without sign-in.
settings.auth.disable.title: Disable authentication?
settings.auth.disable.description: Anyone with access to the server will be able to use More'Wax without signing in. Your Google credentials will be removed.
settings.data.title: Data
setup.discogs.title: Connect to Discogs
setup.discogs.description: More'Wax uses your Discogs account to search releases, fetch prices, and sync your collection.
setup.discogs.invalidError: Invalid token. Please check and try again.
setup.discogs.serverError: Could not reach the server. Please try again.
setup.discogs.tokenInvalid: Your Discogs token is no longer valid. Please enter a new one.
setup.claude.title: Claude AI
setup.claude.description: Enable cover photo identification — snap a photo of a record and Claude Vision will identify it. Costs ~$0.007 per photo (~$0.70 per 100).
setup.claude.getKey: Get an API key from Anthropic
setup.claude.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.
setup.claude.keyInvalid: Your Anthropic API key is invalid or missing. Please enter a valid key.
setup.claude.keyExpired: Your Anthropic API key is no longer valid.
setup.import.title: Import your collection?
setup.import.description: You have records on Discogs. Would you like to import them into More'Wax?
auth.signIn: Sign in to access your vinyl collection.
init.error.title: Error
init.error.discogsTokenInvalid: Your Discogs token is no longer valid. Please enter a new one.
init.error.anthropicKeyInvalid: Your Anthropic API key is no longer valid.
